cmd: echo '=== xfreerdp NLA/security caps ===' && xfreerdp --version 2>&1 | head -5 && echo '=== Test RDP connection (3 sec timeout) ===' && timeout 3 xfreerdp /v:unitex.rdport.net:31230 /u:karmazina.i /p:FAKE_PASS_TEST /cert:ignore /log-level:DEBUG 2>&1 | grep -iE 'security|nla|tls|negotiate|block|locked|fail|error|auth' | head -20 || echo 'Connection attempt done'
